headline: Big Tech's Security Spending Spree: Zuckerberg Leads In Lavish Security Measures
summary: According to a report, leading tech companies are shelling out millions each year to safeguard their CEOs, with some companies paying more than others.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Nvidia, Apple, Lucid And — Dogecoin Surges On Elon Musk's Joke
summary:
Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.



Stocks climbed on Friday, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite marking their best weekly gains of 2024 ahead of the Federal Reserve meeting.

headline: Bill Gates' New Netflix Series Features Mark Cuban, Voted Most Anticipated Guest: Benzinga Poll
summary: A Netflix docuseries will show viewers what Bill Gates is doing to fight several global issues and feature interviews with other leaders.

headline: Tesla China Shines, Lucid Gives Peek Into Model Y Rival, Ford Eyes 'Electric' Restart In India And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: Canoo's suspension of guidance and negative preannouncement underscore the travails faced by EV startups amid a tough industry environment.

headline: Is Amazon Eyeing TikTok For A Possible Acquisition?
summary: In the midst of a looming ban or sale in the U.S., social media giant TikTok is reportedly strengthening its ties with Amazon.com Inc, leading to speculation about a potential acquisition.

headline: Intel Bags $3.5B Contract To Produce Chips For Pentagon: Report
summary: Intel Corporation has secured a $3.5 billion contract to manufacture advanced semiconductors for the U.S. military as part of the Secure Enclave program, despite opposition from rival chipmakers.

headline: OpenAI's $150B Valuation Hinges On Whether Sam Altman-Led AI Startup Can Remove Profit Cap For Investors: Report
summary: AI startup OpenAI's new funding round could value the AI startup at $150 billion, contingent on significant corporate changes.
